Applying to 01010010
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 6 = 1
1 I 7 = 0
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 I 0 = 0
5 I 1 = 1
6 I 2 = 0
7 I 3 = 1

\boxed{10000101}
